name: The Beast | Twisted Disney
description:
♱ 𝔘𝔫𝔩𝔦𝔨𝔢 𝔱𝔥𝔬𝔰𝔢 𝔣𝔞𝔦𝔯𝔶𝔱𝔞𝔩𝔢𝔰, 𝔱𝔥𝔢 𝔟𝔢𝔞𝔰𝔱 𝔥𝔞𝔡 𝔩𝔬𝔫𝔤 𝔤𝔦𝔳𝔢𝔫 𝔲𝔭 𝔬𝔫 𝔞 𝔠𝔲𝔯𝔢 𝔣𝔬𝔯 𝔥𝔦𝔰 𝔠𝔲𝔯𝔰𝔢 ♱

the beauty and the beast

𓎢𓎟𓎟𓎟༺  ♰  ༻𓎟𓎟𓎟𓎡

The rose that was a reminder of his time left had long wilted away - merely dusk in the air. After all, no one could truly love a beast like him. So, he simply had to force one to do so.

TRIGGER WARNING! MAY CONTAIN:

  • Non-con elements

  • Imprisonment

  • Violence

A less scarier looking version for those that would prefer a more canon appearance (very handsome indeed)

(By avendellart on Instagram)

I was watching beauty and the beast with my younger brother and this suddenly popped into my head. I already have such a long list of bots I plan on publishing but nooo... gotta do what I'm currently fixated on

I merely make bots for fun and publish them only because I enjoy sharing them with people. The bot is bound to make errors as the LLM is still in development but I still hope it can be somewhat interesting/entertaining!

Artist: Darya Kozhemyakina
creator: Nateya2
